title: Source Pointer
description: Schema for a source pointer — a traceable reference to the originating document that establishes a specification fact.

source_id.description: Unique identifier for this source pointer.

title.description: Descriptive title of the source document.

document_ref.description: External document reference (project number, addendum number, RFI number).

page_ref.description: Page, paragraph, or clause reference within the source document.
